description: Canonical trade journal. Single source of truth for all positions and realized P&L. Convention: ledger starts 2026-01-01 with 'opening' entries reflecting positions held at that date with TRUE cost basis. All subsequent activity recorded as buy/sell. Custody transfers (IBKR<->UBS) are NOT recorded as trades â€” broker is informational metadata. Realized P&L is computed FIFO at runtime.
